text_blocks.text: arithmetic continues to hold in unique
such a domain is the Gaussian integers
Z[i], that is, the set of complex
numbers of the form a + bi where i
denotes the imaginary unit and a
and b are arbitrary integers. Its
Z) is a Gaussian prime: in the bigger
ring Z(i), 2 factors into the product
of the two Gaussian primes (1 + i)
prime elements in Z) of the form 4k
